dockerBuild.command: docker compose --env-file deploy/enhe-ai-tools/.env -f deploy/enhe-ai-tools/docker-compose.yml build app

dockerUp.command: docker compose --env-file deploy/enhe-ai-tools/.env -f deploy/enhe-ai-tools/docker-compose.yml up -d app

skipLogEvidence: [enhe-ai-tools] Prisma migrate deploy skipped because RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE is not set to 1.
warnings: Docker build logs contain build-time Prisma read errors because build-time static generation cannot reach 127.0.0.1:5432; the Docker build still completed successfully.
No Nginx reload was needed or executed.
nextActions: Keep RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE unset or 0 for EBOS page-only and read-only redeploys.
Use RUN_PRISMA_MIGRATE=1 only for separately approved database migration releases.
